memberdef.argsstring: (float *out, const float *bias, int tile_m, int out_dim)
memberdef.name: add_bias_tile

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t value, size_t align)
memberdef.name: align_up_size

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *W_gate, const float *W_up, const float *W_down, float *output, int seq_len, int hidden, int intermediate, float *scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_mlp_swiglu_prefill

briefdescription.para: Fused MLP (Gate + Up + SwiGLU + Down) for prefill.

detaileddescription.para: Tiles along token dimension to keep gate/up/hidden in L3 cache.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *W_gate, const float *W_up, const float *W_down, const float *B_gate, const float *B_up, const float *B_down, float *output, int seq_len, int hidden, int intermediate, float *scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_mlp_swiglu_prefill_bias

briefdescription.para: Fused MLP for prefill with proper tiling.

detaileddescription.para: Fused MLP (Gate + Up + SwiGLU + Down) for prefill with biases.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const void *W1, const float *B1, CKDataType w1_dt, const void *W2, const float *B2, CKDataType w2_dt, float *output, int seq_len, int embed_dim, int aligned_embed_dim, int intermediate_dim, int aligned_intermediate_dim, void *scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_mlp_swiglu_prefill_w1w2_quant

briefdescription.para: Quantized fused MLP for prefill (W1=gate+up, W2=down)

detaileddescription.para: Uses Q8_0 activations for W1 (Q5_0/Q8_0 weights) and Q8_K activations for W2 (Q4_K/Q6_K weights).

memberdef.argsstring: (int aligned_embed_dim, int aligned_intermediate_dim)
memberdef.name: fused_mlp_swiglu_prefill_w1w2_quant_scratch_size

briefdescription.para: Get scratch buffer size for fused_mlp_swiglu_prefill_w1w2_quant.

memberdef.argsstring: (int intermediate)
memberdef.name: fused_mlp_swiglu_scratch_size

briefdescription.para: Get scratch size for fused MLP.

detaileddescription.para: Get scratch buffer size for fused_mlp_swiglu_prefill.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *gamma, const float *W, float *output, int seq_len, int hidden, int out_dim, float eps, float *x_norm_scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_rmsnorm_gemm_2d_tiled

briefdescription.para: Fused RMSNorm + single GEMM with 2D tiling (weight reuse)

detaileddescription.para: Tiles along N (weights) OUTER, M (tokens) INNER. Weight tiles are reused across all token tiles.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *gamma, const float *Wq, const float *Wk, const float *Wv, float *Q, float *K, float *V, int seq_len, int hidden, int q_dim, int kv_dim, float eps, float *scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_rmsnorm_qkv_prefill

briefdescription.para: Fused RMSNorm + QKV projection for prefill (v3 optimized)

detaileddescription.para: Fused RMSNorm + QKV projection for prefill.
KEY INSIGHT: For Qwen2-0.5B, all QKV weights fit in L3: Wq (896×896) + Wk (128×896) + Wv (128×896) = 4.1MB < 6MB L3

So we use M-tiling (tokens) only:
For each token tile: a. Compute RMSNorm ONCE into scratch (x_norm stays in L2) b. Do all three GEMMs (Q, K, V) against cached x_norm c. Weights stay hot in L3 across all token tiles

This avoids both:
Large x_norm intermediate buffer (only TILE_M × hidden in L2)
RMSNorm recomputation (done once per token tile, used 3×)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *gamma, const float *Wq, const float *Bq, const float *Wk, const float *Bk, const float *Wv, const float *Bv, float *Q, float *K, float *V, int seq_len, int embed_dim, int aligned_embed_dim, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int kv_stride_tokens, float eps, float *scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_rmsnorm_qkv_prefill_head_major

briefdescription.para: Fused RMSNorm + QKV projection for prefill (head-major outputs)

detaileddescription.para: Q is written as [num_heads, seq_len, aligned_head_dim]. K/V are written with kv_stride_tokens for KV-cache compatibility.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *gamma, const void *Wq, const float *Bq, CKDataType wq_dt, const void *Wk, const float *Bk, CKDataType wk_dt, const void *Wv, const float *Bv, CKDataType wv_dt, float *Q, float *K, float *V, int seq_len, int embed_dim, int aligned_embed_dim, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int kv_stride_tokens, float eps, void *scratch)
memberdef.name: fused_rmsnorm_qkv_prefill_head_major_quant

briefdescription.para: Fused RMSNorm + QKV projection for prefill (head-major, Q8 activations)

detaileddescription.para: Supports Q5_0 or Q8_0 weights with Q8_0 activations. Writes K/V directly into KV cache layout (kv_stride_tokens).

memberdef.argsstring: (int aligned_embed_dim)
memberdef.name: fused_rmsnorm_qkv_prefill_head_major_quant_scratch_size

memberdef.argsstring: (int hidden)
memberdef.name: fused_rmsnorm_qkv_scratch_size

briefdescription.para: Get scratch size for fused prefill.

detaileddescription.para: Get scratch buffer size for fused_rmsnorm_qkv_prefill.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const float *B_tile, float *C, int tile_m, int tile_n, int K, int C_stride)
memberdef.name: gemm_tile_nt_strided

briefdescription.para: GEMM tile with N-dimension tiling (weight reuse)

detaileddescription.para: Computes: C[tile_m × tile_n] = A[tile_m × K] × B[tile_n × K]^T where B_tile is a slice of rows from the weight matrix.
Uses MKL if available for optimal performance.

parameterdescription.para: Output tile [tile_m × tile_n] (column slice of full output)
Stride between rows of C (= full N dimension)

memberdef.argsstring: (CKDataType dt)
memberdef.name: mlp_q8_0_dtype_supported

memberdef.argsstring: (CKDataType dt)
memberdef.name: mlp_q8_k_dtype_supported

memberdef.argsstring: (CKDataType dt)
memberdef.name: qkv_q8_0_dtype_supported

memberdef.argsstring: (CKDataType dt)
memberdef.name: qkv_q8_k_dtype_supported

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *gamma, float *output, int tile_m, int embed_dim, int aligned_embed_dim, float eps)
memberdef.name: rmsnorm_tile

briefdescription.para: Compute RMSNorm for a tile of tokens.

memberdef.argsstring: (float x)
memberdef.name: silu_prefill

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *gamma, const float *Wq, const float *Wk, const float *Wv, float *x_norm, float *Q, float *K, float *V, int seq_len, int hidden, int q_dim, int kv_dim, float eps)
memberdef.name: unfused_rmsnorm_qkv_prefill

briefdescription.para: Fused kernels for prefill phase with proper 2D tiling.

sect1.title: CK-ENGINE KERNEL RULES:

listitem.para: NO malloc/free - memory via bump allocator, pointers passed in
NO OpenMP - parallelization at orchestrator/codegen layer
API must define: inputs, outputs, workspace, and memory layouts
Pure computation - deterministic, no side effects

sect1.para: After changes: make test && make llamacpp-parity-full

sect2.title: KEY INSIGHT:
sect2.para:
Naive M-dimension tiling (token tiles) causes weight reloading:
32 token tiles × 4MB weights = 128MB DRAM reads!

Correct approach: Tile along N (output/weight) dimension OUTER, M (token) dimension INNER. This way:
Load weight tile once
Process ALL tokens against that weight tile
Weight tile stays in cache while streaming through tokens

sect2.title: TILING STRATEGY:
sect2.para: for n_tile in [0, N, TILE_N]: # Outer: weight tiles load B[n_tile:n_tile+TILE_N, :] into L3 for m_tile in [0, M, TILE_M]: # Inner: token tiles x_norm = rmsnorm(A[m_tile]) # x_norm in L2 C[m_tile, n_tile] = x_norm × B_tile # Consumes B from L3

Cache behavior:
Weight tile (TILE_N × K × 4 bytes) fits in L3
x_norm tile (TILE_M × K × 4 bytes) fits in L2
Weights loaded once per tile, reused across all token tiles
